records.ety: [CF. F. sensualit, L. sensualitas sensibility, capacity for sensation.]

defs: The quality or state of being sensual; devotedness to the gratification of the bodily appetites; free indulgence in carnal or sensual pleasures; luxuriousness; voluptuousness; lewdness.
quotes: Those pampered animals That rage in savage sensuality.
They avoid dress, lest they should have affections tainted by any sensuality.
